Bourbon's probably going to go out for the early lead.
I just need to keep my eyes on her, and follow.
Just keep following…
Our field of ten is all in line, and… they're off!

Mihono Bourbon storms out of the gate! She weaves her 
way right to the front!
She's so fast…
But I won't let her out of my sight…

Heavy favorite Mihono Bourbon commands the race! 
Second pick Rice Shower is running in fourth!

Mihono Bourbon is still the leader as they round the 
second corner into the backstretch!
Just keep following, just keep following…

No moves being made yet as they make their way down 
Kyoto's iconic third-corner slope.
…Now!

Oh! Rice Shower is coming alive now! With Mihono 
Bourbon in her sights, she moves up to second position!

Could we see a repeat of the Derby? Mihono Bourbon 
leads the field around the final corner! And they're into the 
stretch!
400 meters remaining!
I can hear her heartbeat… her breathing!
Faster! Faster! Faster!
Rice?!

Rice Shower is hot on her tail! But Mihono Bourbon won't 
cede an inch! The lead belongs to her!
I want to win! …I want to win!

And it's Mihono Bourbon — not even close! Seven straight 
wins! Her road to the Triple Crown is paved in gold!
